# validate.map_truth { #tspaint.validate.map_truth }

```python
tspaint.validate.map_truth(truth, state_of_pop)
```

Remap truth tracts from population ids to ancestry-state indices.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**truth**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[tuple](`tuple`)\[[float](`float`), [float](`float`), [int](`int`)\]\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Truth tracts ``{sample: [(left, right, pop_id)]}`` (e.g. from :func:`tspaint.sim.local_ancestry_truth`).

<code>[**state_of_pop**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Mapping from population id to ancestry-state index.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[tuple](`tuple`)\[[float](`float`), [float](`float`), [int](`int`)\]\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The same tracts with each ``pop_id`` replaced by its ancestry-state index, keyed by integer sample id.
